description: Foundations Patch 4 (17 June 2024) — Resilience buff display change, Combat Balance Changes (Crossbows, Cursed Staffs, Daggers, Fire Staffs, Hammers, Quarterstaffs, Shapeshifter Staffs, Spears, Swords, Helmets, Shoes), Fixes.

sections.heading: Changes
items: Resilience amount is no longer displayed as a buff on players during combat
sections.searchable_text: Changes Resilience buff displayed players combat

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes
sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Crossbows Divine Engine Energy Shaper Cursed Staffs Dark Matter Daggers Lunging Stabs Bloodletter Fire Staffs Pyroblast Hammers Grasp of the Undead Tombhammer Quarterstaffs Stun Run Rising Blow Separator Soaring Swipe Double Bladed Shapeshifter Staffs Pulse Shock Tectonic Shift Earthrune Spears Harpoon Swords Fearless Strike Carving Sword Spinning Blades Dual Swords Helmets Immortal Mistwalker Hood Shoes After Image Mistwalker Shoes Royal March Royal Boots

subsections.heading: Crossbows
subsections.searchable_text: Crossbows Divine Engine Energy Shaper Channel Time 4s 3.3s ticks 13 11 Damage per tick players 80 96 mobs 26 57

changes.raw_text: Divine Engine: Channel Time: 4s → 3.3s; Number of ticks: 13 → 11; Damage per tick vs players: 80 → 96; Damage per tick vs mobs: 26 → 57

subsections.heading: Cursed Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Cursed Staffs Dark Matter ticks 10 8 Damage per tick players 78 98 mobs 39 49

changes.raw_text: Dark Matter: Number of ticks: 10 → 8; Damage per tick vs players: 78 → 98; Damage per tick vs mobs: 39 → 49

subsections.heading: Daggers
subsections.searchable_text: Daggers Lunging Stabs Bloodletter below 40% health cooldown 50% Cooldown 30s 35s

changes.raw_text: Lunging Stabs: When hitting a player below 40% health, cooldown is now reduced by 50%. Cooldown: 30s → 35s.
notes: When hitting a player below 40% health, cooldown is now reduced by 50%

changes.raw_text: Pyroblast: 0s Channel Damage: 200 → 190; 0.6s Channel Damage: 280 → 266; 1.2s Channel Damage: 360 → 342

subsections.heading: Hammers
subsections.searchable_text: Hammers Grasp of the Undead Tombhammer Hitpoint Reduction 10% Duration 3s

changes.raw_text: Grasp of the Undead: Added Hitpoint Reduction: 10%; Hitpoint Reduction Duration: 3s

subsections.heading: Quarterstaffs
subsections.searchable_text: Quarterstaffs Stun Run movespeed auto-attack Rising Blow cooldown 12% 15% stacks 3 Separator 80 damage untargeted Soaring Swipe Double Bladed Staff Cooldown 20s 25s player 20% Area Radius 6m 5m

changes.raw_text: Stun Run: Movespeed buff now ends upon auto-attacking
notes: Movespeed buff now ends upon auto-attacking

changes.raw_text: Rising Blow: Cooldown reduction per player hit: 12% → 15% (stacks up to 3 times)
Separator: Now deals 80 damage to all untargeted enemies hit
notes: Now deals 80 damage to all untargeted enemies hit

changes.raw_text: Soaring Swipe: Cooldown: 20s → 25s; Hitting a player now reduces the ability's cooldown by 20%; Area Radius: 6m → 5m
notes: Hitting a player now reduces the ability's cooldown by 20%

subsections.heading: Shapeshifter Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Shapeshifter Staffs Pulse Shock Damage 124 109 Tectonic Shift Earthrune Staff Hitpoint reduction 15% 10%

subsections.heading: Spears
subsections.searchable_text: Spears Harpoon Max range 18m 20m Projectile speed 23.33 23.53

subsections.heading: Swords
subsections.searchable_text: Swords Fearless Strike Carving Sword Damage 150.10 135 Spinning Blades Dual Swords Auto-Attack Damage 100% 65% Attack Speed 50% 30% buff duration 3s 4s

changes.raw_text: Spinning Blades: Auto-Attack Damage Increase buff: 100% → 65%; Attack Speed buff: 50% → 30%; Damage buff duration: 3s → 4s

subsections.heading: Shoes
subsections.searchable_text: Shoes After Image Mistwalker Shoes 1st Cast Cooldown 15s 12s Royal March Royal Boots Movement Speed per Stack 8% 9%

changes.raw_text: Royal March: Movement Speed per Stack: 8% → 9%

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Fixed issue where Soaring Swipe (Double Bladed Staff) slow effect would also apply to enemies in an area around the intended targets
Fixed issue where Tectonic Slam (Earthrune Staffs) did not apply debuff icon to enemies to indicate health reduction
Fixed issue where Enfeeble Blades (Lifecurse Staffs) would inflict too much damage and an unintended slow effect
Fixed issue where 'Required for' section was missing from Artifact item details
Fixed issue where items in Eralia Wayfarer's menu would not display correctly by tier after deselecting 'Show craftable from inventory only'
Fixed issue where the countdown banner was not displayed during a duel
Fixed issue where guild logos would sometimes not display correctly when entering a crowded region
Fixed issue where chests in Heretic dungeons could not be opened without first destroying Volatile Barrels

Fixed issue where the Arena search for a group would reset if a party member accepted a match while gathering, fishing, or opening a Tome; accepting an Arena match is no longer possible while engaged in those actions
[Mobile] Fixed issue where faction zerg markers on the minimap would display the wrong color
sections.searchable_text: Fixes Soaring Swipe slow effect Tectonic Slam debuff Enfeeble Blades damage slow Artifact Required for Eralia Wayfarer tier duel countdown banner guild logos crowded Heretic dungeons Volatile Barrels Arena party member gathering fishing Tome Mobile faction zerg markers minimap
